mapper.select: SELECT pds_id, title, content, os_info, version, file_size, download_count, thumbnail, download_url, category, sort_order, published_at, is_active, reg_date, update_date FROM pds WHERE pds_id = #{pdsId} AND is_active = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE pds SET download_count = download_count + 1 WHERE pds_id = #{pdsId}
